title: internal/mkcw: make errors easier to compare, update tests
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Add Unwrap() methods to our internal bespoke mkcw error types, and have the tests check for and ignore expected error cases.  Fixes warnings from the "nilness" analyzer in `gopls`.

#### How to verify it

Updated unit tests!

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Fixes #6662

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
